hooks.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')); const f=d.tool_input?.file_path||d.tool_response?.filePath||''; if(!f) process.exit(0); const isFrontend=f.includes('pathora/frontend')||f.includes('pathora\\frontend'); const isBackend=f.includes('panthora_be'); if(isFrontend) require('child_process').exec('cd D:/Doan2/pathora/frontend && npm run lint --silent', ()=>{}); if(isBackend) require('child_process').exec('cd D:/Doan2/panthora_be && dotnet build LocalService.slnx --verbosity quiet', ()=>{});"
